entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop being bred at ICRISAT to improve yield and resistance

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing high yielding breeding lines or populations

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics where the breeding program is conducted

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The ability of the crop to produce a large amount of harvestable product

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand factors limiting production

relationships.description: Breeding work is performed on groundnut
ICRISAT is the institution conducting the breeding program
The objective of breeding is to produce high yielding lines
The objective of breeding is to produce resistance to limiting factors
High yield is a desired trait for groundnut
Resistance is a desired trait for groundnut
